items.title: China’s Z.ai claims it can match Mythos on cybersecurity
items.summary: China's Zhipu AI (Z.ai) released its open-weight GLM-5.2, and some researchers have claimed that it matches Mythos in certain bug-finding and cybersecurity scenarios. While GLM...

items.title: Why did this journal retract two 1940s papers by Max Planck?
